title: ZiranWeb
description: The personal website itself, the entry split-screen and content page system built by Next.js Tailwind

title: Nature Diary
description: About Full-stack + distributed Nature Diary: Streamlit UI, FastAPI REST APIs, Postgres persistence, and Redis-backed async worker for CV-style processing (PENDING → PROCESSED). Built to be demoable, scalable, and extendable to real vision models and smart-glasses workflows.
